<type>file</type>
<content>1: /**
2:  * Collaborative editing connection using WebSockets.
3:  * Implements the client side of prosemirror-collab's authority model.
4:  * 
5:  * Wire Protocol (MessagePack arrays):
6:  * - [0, version, doc, mode] - Init: server sends initial state and content mode
7:  * - [1, version, steps, clientID] - Steps: client sends changes
8:  * - [2, steps, clientIDs] - Update: server broadcasts changes
9:  * - [3, version] - Ack: server confirms steps applied
10:  * - [4, clientID, head, anchor, name?, idleSecs?] - Cursor position
11:  * - [5, error] - Error message
12:  * - [6, clientID] - Cursor removed (client disconnected)
13:  * 
14:  * Content Modes:
15:  * - "rich" - ProseMirror JSON files, full editor
16:  * - "markdown" - Markdown files, full editor (server converts)
17:  * - "plain" - Plain text files, full editor
18:  * - "raw" - Code/config files, minimal editor (no toolbar)
19:  * - "media" - Media files, displayed natively
20:  * - "binary" - Binary files, not editable
21:  * 
22:  * The idleSecs field is only sent when the server sends existing cursors
23:  * to a newly connected client, indicating how long the cursor has been idle.
24:  * 
25:  * Additionally, the server sends empty text messages periodically
26:  * (instead of WebSocket Ping frames) to trigger cursor decoration refresh.
27:  * Client responds with empty text as pong.
28:  * 
29:  * Connection State Management:
30:  * - On WebSocket open: calls setConnectionState('connected')

(Showing lines 1-30 of 369. Use offset=31 to continue.)
</content>
